name: brands_data_workflow
description: Workflow to fetch brands data, update supplementary brands entity if fetch is successful, and apply workflow timestamp.

transitions.name: fetch_brands
transitions.description: Fetch brands data from external API and update job status.
transitions.end_state_description: Brands data has been fetched and job status updated.

externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_brands
externalized_processors.description: Fetch brands data from external API and update status based on response.

transitions.name: update_supplementary
transitions.description: Update supplementary brands entity with fetched data if fetch was completed.
transitions.end_state_description: Supplementary brands entity has been updated with fetched data.

externalized_processors.name: process_update_supplementary_brands
externalized_processors.description: Update the supplementary brands entity with the fetched data if job status is completed.

transitions.name: apply_workflow_timestamp
transitions.description: Apply workflow timestamp to mark the completion of the workflow.
transitions.end_state_description: Workflow timestamp applied to the job entity.

externalized_processors.name: process_set_workflow_applied
externalized_processors.description: Mark the job entity with the current UTC timestamp indicating workflow execution.
